# U.S. Military Pay Calculator (militarypaytool.com)

> Free 2026 U.S. military pay calculator and reference. Computes monthly and annual
> take-home pay for active duty and Reserve/National Guard: basic pay (2026 tables,
> 3.8% raise), BAH by ZIP code (official DoD rates), BAS, special pays, federal/FICA/state
> tax, TSP, SGLI, combat-zone tax exclusion, drill pay, and reserve retirement points.
> No login. Unofficial planning tool — a member's LES is the authoritative source.

Key facts (2026): basic pay raise 3.8% (effective 2026-01-01); BAS $476.95/mo enlisted,
$328.48/mo officer; SGLI $0.05 per $1,000 + $1 TSGLI ($26/mo at $500,000); Social Security
6.2% up to $184,500; Medicare 1.45% (+0.9% over $200k); TSP elective limit $24,500.
BAH location tables are official 2025 DoD rates (latest complete public dataset; 2026
averages ~4.2% higher). Drill pay: one 4-hour drill period = 1/30 of monthly basic pay.

## Core pages

- [Pay calculator](https://militarypaytool.com/): interactive 2026 take-home pay calculator (active duty & reserve)
- [BAH rates by location](https://militarypaytool.com/bah/): rate tables for 299 military housing areas, every grade, with/without dependents
- [All pay guides](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/): plain-English articles on military pay

## Policy news & interpretation (updated June 2026)

- [2027 military pay raise tracker](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/2027-military-pay-raise-tracker.html): proposed tiered raise — 7% for E-5 and below, 6% for E-6–O-3, 5% for O-4+; passed House committee June 5, 2026; not yet law
- [FY2027 NDAA benefits roundup](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/fy2027-ndaa-pay-benefits.html): BAH excluded from Basic Needs Allowance, bereavement leave, direct-access physical therapy, child care expansion
- [BAH reform 95%→100%](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/bah-reform-95-to-100.html): members absorb $93–$212/month since 2019; $2.9B supplemental funded in 2025

## Key guides

- [2026 military pay chart](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/2026-military-pay-chart.html): full basic pay table for every rank
- [2026 military pay raise](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/2026-military-pay-raise.html): the 3.8% increase in dollars by rank
- [2026 BAH explained](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/2026-bah-rates-explained.html): how the housing allowance works
- [2026 BAS rates](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/2026-bas-rates.html): subsistence allowance amounts
- [Reserve & Guard drill pay](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/reserve-drill-pay-explained.html): drill periods, Annual Training, retirement points
- [States that don't tax military pay](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/states-that-dont-tax-military-pay.html)
- [Military TSP explained](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/military-tsp-explained.html): BRS matching and 2026 limits
- [Combat zone tax exclusion](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/combat-zone-tax-exclusion.html): how deployed pay becomes tax-free
- [Military retirement: BRS vs High-3](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/military-retirement-brs-vs-high3.html): pension multipliers and a 20-year example
- [SGLI cost](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/sgli-cost-2026.html): 2026 premium table
- [E-5 pay](https://militarypaytool.com/blog/how-much-does-an-e5-make-2026.html) and similar pages for E-1 through E-9 and O-1 through O-5

## Data sources

DFAS 2026 basic pay tables; DTMO official BAH datasets; IRS 2026 brackets (post-OBBBA);
SSA 2026 FICA parameters; VA SGLI rates.
